meta.title: World Cup 2026 Predictions
meta.description: Predict scores, earn points, and climb the leaderboard for FIFA World Cup 2026.

footer.tagline: FIFA World Cup 2026 · USA · Canada · Mexico
footer.disclaimer: Fan prediction app — not affiliated with FIFA

home.heroDescription: Join fans across USA, Canada, and Mexico. Pick scores before kickoff, earn points for correct winners and exact scores, and climb the global rankings.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to World Cup glory
home.step1Description: Predict the exact scoreline for every match before kickoff. Once the whistle blows, your pick is locked.
home.step2Description: Get 3 points for the correct winner, 5 bonus for an exact score, and streak multipliers on hot runs.
home.step3Description: Compete globally, with friends, or by country. Track your rank through every stage of the tournament.
home.ctaDescription: The biggest World Cup ever is coming to North America. Make your predictions and prove you know the beautiful game.
home.bannerCaption: The greatest show on earth — North America 2026

dashboard.title: Match Predictions
dashboard.subtitle: Pick scores before kickoff
dashboard.noMatchesDescription: Try adjusting your filters or switch to another tab.

prediction.lockedDescription: This match has started or finished. Predictions can no longer be submitted.

matchDetail.headToHeadDescription: Historical data will appear here when connected to Sportmonks API.

groups.title: Group Stage
groups.subtitle: Top two from each group advance to the Round of 32

bracket.title: Knockout Bracket
bracket.subtitle: Follow the road to the final across North America

rules.title: Rules & Scoring
rules.subtitle: Everything you need to compete
rules.scoringNote: Only the highest applicable rule applies per match — exact score earns 5 points only (no stacking).
rules.kickoffLock: Predictions close at kickoff — no changes once the match begins.
rules.correctWinnerDesc: Pick the winning team (not exact score)
rules.correctDrawDesc: Predict a draw when the match ends level
rules.correctGoalDiffDesc: Right margin without exact score or winner
rules.makingPredictions1: Submit your predicted scoreline before kickoff for each match.
rules.makingPredictions2: Once the match starts, predictions are locked and cannot be changed.
rules.makingPredictions3: You can update predictions any time before kickoff.
rules.leaderboard1: Global — All players ranked by total points.
rules.leaderboard2: Friends — Compare against your connected friends.
rules.leaderboard3: Country — Rankings filtered to players from your country.
rules.leaderboard4: Rankings update after official match results are recorded.
rules.format2: Top two from each group plus eight best third-place teams advance.
rules.format3: Knockout rounds: Round of 32 → Round of 16 → Quarter-finals → Semi-finals → Final.
